title: Automation to delete any item matching a given Filter
excerpt: Is it possible to create an automation which deletes any item created or modified which meets the criteria in a given filter?   For example if I have a Board with  incoming email I might want to delete all items with a k…

posts.author: rkaplan (Richard Kaplan)
posts.cookedHtml: Is it possible to create an automation which deletes any item created or modified which meets the criteria in a given filter? For example if I have a Board with incoming email I might want to delete all items with a keyword associated with spam.
